programme.desc: Dr Jeff and his staff treat a pet goat that has been injured in a freak accident and a dog that has been unwell ever since swallowing a mysterious object

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Nearly a year has passed since Earl's run-in with the law as Earl and Toney join forces to rescue a dog from an abandoned home. Mariah must make a difficult decision

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: An Italian family's bond is affected by cat Max's behaviour. Plus, a woman moves in with a friend not knowing that the resident feline has psychotic tendencies

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Two best friends and room-mates clash when one is terrorised by the other's cat, Buddha. Plus, a couple take to sleeping in separate beds because of troublesome feline Dylan

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson heads to Alabama's Appalachia to build a treehouse fit for a budding James Bond, featuring talking gadgets, hidden passageways, secret rooms and more

programme.title: Meet the Superbrains
programme.desc: The work of pioneering engineers seeking to solve space's biggest mysteries via access to an international range of institutions, including Nasa, the European Space Agency and CERN

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How can elephants hear something hundreds of miles away? What goes on inside a chicken's egg? How has an incredible snake learnt how to fly?

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How can a fish fly the length of three football fields? Can a spider be adorable? What's the real story behind a flamingo's colour?

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: In Indonesia, Forrest Galante seeks the Miller's grizzled langur, or Dracula monkey. When he hears of an illegal pet market, his search becomes a rescue mission

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: The crew members return to Fairbanks after escaping the storms at Gold Run, but with the season coming to an end, they hope to find enough gold so they can afford to return next year

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: A look back at the tanks ATM built that were inspired by moments in history, including a 1920s mob-themed tank and a 1960s lava lamp tank

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Baseball star Pete Rose wants Riverfront Stadium transformed into an aquarium, and Wayde and Heather travel to Horry County to build a huge tank

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The spring break-up is starting to occur and the snow is melting. Meanwhile, Neil aims to start construction on the renovation of the mine

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A couple call in a veteran demonologist when they hear ghostly threats and find bloody handprints on their baby's crib. Stories of paranormal events

programme.title: Phelps v Shark
programme.desc: Documentary in which former Olympic swimmer Michael Phelps tests his skills in the water by competing in a race against a shark - one of the world's fastest marine predators

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: A game of underwater copycat shows how smart dolphins really are. Plus, how hyenas can eat pretty much anything and geckos' ability to apparently defy gravity

programme.title: Reggae at the BBC
programme.desc: A celebration of reggae performances from the BBC archives, featuring footage from programmes including Top of the Pops, Old Grey Whistle Test and Later with Jools Holland. Acts include Bob Marley and the Wailers, Gregory Isaacs, Desmond Dekker, Burning Spear, Althea and Donna, Dennis Brown and Buju Banton

programme.title: Art of Scandinavia
programme.desc: Andrew Graham-Dixon explores the history of the North European region through its art. He begins by examining the links between landscape, climate and national character, taking in everything from the era of the Vikings to Edvard Munch's The Scream

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on October 22, 1999. Featuring Macy Gray, B*Witched, ATB, Honeyz, Liam Gallagher and Steve Craddock, Steps, Tina Turner and Christina Aguilera.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on October 29, 1999. Featuring Tina Turner, Simply Red, Eternal, Will Smith, A.T.F.C. Presents OnePhatDeeva, Destiny's Child and Westlife

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Peter Powell and Gary Davies present the May 16 edition, featuring Kim Wilde, Bryan Ferry, Duran Duran, Jimmy Nail, Debarge, Phyllis Nelson, Paul Hardcastle and Divine

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: David Jensen and John Peel present the pop chart programme, first broadcast on May 10, 1984. Includes appearances from Belle & the Devotions, Queen, the Flying Pickets, Bob Marley & the Wailers, Terri Wells, the Pointer Sisters and Duran Duran

programme.title: Hot Chocolate at the BBC
programme.desc: Compilation of BBC performances and rare interview extracts celebrating British pop group Hot Chocolate and in particular its lead soloist Errol Brown. The band's top 10 hits from the 1970s and early 1980s are showcased, alongside rarely seen early performances and cult fan favourites

programme.title: When Bob Marley Came to Britain
programme.desc: Documentary examining the reggae superstar's relationship with the UK, and how his universal message of one love and unity helped inspire a generation of young black British people. The film also takes a revealing look at how Marley spent his time while he was in Britain - the houses he lived in, football kickabouts in Battersea Park and visits to the UK's growing Rastafarian community, including secret gigs in the north of England

programme.title: Bob Marley Reimagined
programme.desc: A concert at Birmingham's Town Hall celebrating the reggae superstar, featuring songs including Get Up Stand Up, One Love/People Get Ready, Redemption Song, Satisfy My Soul, Is This Love, I Shot the Sheriff and Exodus. Hosted by Trevor Nelson, the concert features the Chineke! Orchestra joined by Bob's grandson Skip Marley, singer-songwriter JP Cooper and singer Ruby Turner

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: A January 1975 edition of the old-time music hall show from the City Varieties Theatre, Leeds, in which chairman Leonard Sachs welcomes performers including Ken Dodd, Barry Kent, Lyn Kennington, John Bouchier and Saxburger to the stage

programme.title: Wild Scotland
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan explores his native Mull and some of the nearby islands, filming otters, deer, puffins, seals and a minke whale

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: A January 1975 edition of the old-time music hall show from the City Varieties Theatre, Leeds, in which chairman Leonard Sachs welcomes performers including Ken Dodd, Barry Kent, Lyn Kennington, John Bouchier and Saxburger to the stage

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: A friend of Hetty's asks the sleuth to represent her at a creditor's meeting and try to recover her money when a furniture shop goes bankrupt, but there more to the case than meets the eye. Back at home, Hetty's interfering brother-in-law Frank has come to stay and Robert has flown off to Australia to visit their son Derek

programme.title: Michael Palin: The Art of Travel
programme.desc: Michael discovers that the Great Western Railway had the most sophisticated public relations machine of all the railway companies between the two World Wars, producing high-quality publications and promotional gimmicks

programme.title: The Teachers' Lounge (2023)
programme.desc: When one of her students is suspected of theft, a teacher tries to get to the bottom of it. Caught between her ideals and the school system, the consequences of her actions threaten to break her. German drama, starring Leonie Benesch, Anne-Kathrin Gummich, Rafael Stachowiak and Michael Klammer

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth dreads the idea of attending Onslow's birthday celebrations. However, she changes her mind when she learns a limousine will be arriving to take her to the party. Starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy's rich aunt pays him a visit, bringing out his nagging mother's snobbish streak, and he also has an encounter with a garage owner and his dogs

programme.title: Ian Hislop Goes Off the Rails
programme.desc: The story behind the 1963 Beeching Report, commissioned under Harold Macmillan's government, which led to the closure of a third of Britain's rail network. With contributions from experts, campaigners, railwaymen and passengers, Private Eye editor Ian Hislop outlines the historical background to the proposals, along with the social and economic impact that followed their implementation

programme.title: Living Famously
programme.desc: A profile of the ballet dancer. whose electrifying performances and enigmatic personality made him ballet's first superstar. First broadcast in 2003

programme.title: Personal Cinema: Maggie Smith
programme.desc: In a programme first broadcast in 1970, the actress talks to Michael Aspel about her career and chooses scenes from some of her favourite films, including Way Out West, The Last Hurrah, On the Waterfront, Some Like It Hot and The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie

Plus, the woman whose cottage holiday didn't live up to expectations - but didn't receive a penny in compensation

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sullivan's dream of leaving Kembleford is scuppered when he is arrested for receiving stolen goods. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Celebrity Escape to the Country
programme.desc: West End and Broadway singer Alfie Boe aims to swap the stage for rural Sussex as Ginny Buckley presents him with a selection of showstopping rural properties. Away from the house-hunting, the duo race agricultural vehicles at a vintage tractor club. Can Alfie find his dream home and keep up with Ginny on the track?

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.sub-title: Midlands - A Celestial Projector Is Brought Back to Life
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea and Mark Stuckey are in the Black Country, tackling the needs of a big red bus. After being used as a mobile shelter by a homelessness charity for a few years, a leaking roof and outdated electrics have combined to keep it off the road. It's a huge fix to take on, in every sense, and the team needs all the help vintage vehicle restorer Mark Owen can provide if they're to get it back into service. Plus, Pauline presents a celestial projector, once owned by her husband. Now the light has stopped working, and many of the constellations have worn away

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp welcomes a team of drag queens to take part in the game show. The Vivienne, Tia Kofi, Kitty Scott-Claus and Lawrence Chaney walk across the bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies, in a bid to take home as much cash as possible for their chosen charity

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Susan Wokoma for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers

programme.desc: Anna Haugh and Grace Dent present the last quarter-final. The hopefuls begin with an invention test in which they have to serve a sweet or savoury plate of food that makes the most of fruit. Then, restaurant critic Leyla Kazim sets them a brief, asking for a dish that uses an ingredient they used to hate when they were children

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell hosts as comedian Roisin Conaty and Karl Turner MP join Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the news headlines

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Brendan O'Carroll returns as Agnes Brown, the loudest, proudest woman in Ireland. Without even leaving the house, the doting mother-of-six becomes a podcast sensation, as Cathy is horrified to discover her parent accidentally hijacking her new online venture. Simon Delaney guest stars, with Jennifer Gibney

programme.desc: Alex is excited when her old mentor pays the ward a visit, but the others are terrified of her. Matt and Serena try to help a patient find out why he keeps suddenly fainting

programme.title: St Denis Medical
programme.sub-title: I Left a Woman on the Table
programme.desc: The ward is buzzing when Matt's secret wife appears. Bruce and Chaplain Steve compete for Dr Henderson and Joyce puts herself back on the floor as a nurse

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Comedy about a proud gang of LGBTQ+ friends in Middlesbrough. Dickie, Mam, Lucinda and Sal throw a surprise coming-out party for Stewart at Keith's World of Carpets, which turns into a venture in wonderland. Written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell and Monica Dolan

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: The queens get Stewart ready for his first date - and decide to invite themselves along as well. Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Elijah Young, Mark Benton and Alexandra Mardell

programme.title: FA Cup Football
programme.desc: Build-up to the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, which sees Chelsea taking on Manchester City

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Manchester City (Kick-off 3.00pm). Mark Chapman presents all the action from the 145th staging of the final, held at Wembley Stadium. Despite experiencing a tumultuous campaign which has seen manager Enzo Maresca and his successor Liam Rosenior both leave the club, Chelsea reached this showpiece match when they defeated Leeds United 1-0 in the last four. City are looking to win a domestic treble, having already won the League Cup, but they lost to Palace 1-0 in last term's final and briefly looked to be heading out of the competition in the semi-finals this time around, before late goals by Nico Gonzalez and Jeremy Doku gave them a 2-1 win over Southampton. With analysis from MIcah Richards and Wayne Rooney, reports from Kelly Somers, and commentary by Guy Mowbray and Alan Shearer

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a celebrity edition of the high stakes quiz, joined by a team of soap stars. Nick Pickard from Hollyoaks, Coronation Street's Sue Cleaver, Emmerdale's Rebecca Sarker and Perry Fenwick from EastEnders take on the bridge in support of their chosen charities

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the revival of the comedy quiz show, in which Kym Marsh, Jenny Ryan, Babatunde Aleshe, Chris McCausland, Michael Dapaah and Chizzy Akudolu fill in the blanks to help contestants win some brilliant prizes

programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan asks general knowledge questions against the clock as contestants Jill Scott, Laura Tobin, Nella Rose, Simon Rimmer, Jaz Singh, Stephen Bailey, Joel Corry and Kate Quilton try to avoid being voted off the team to win a potential prize pot of £50,000 for their charity

programme.title: Eurovision Song Contest
programme.desc: Victoria Swarovski and Michael Ostrowski present the 70th song contest from the Wiener Stadthalle arena in Vienna, where the 20 acts that made it through the semi-finals, plus the host nation and the pre-qualified 'big four' - Italy, Germany, France and the UK - will be taking the stage in the hope of winning over the judges and the voters at home. Graham Norton will be providing his usual commentary, and representing the UK is electro act Look Mum No Computer, hoping to avoid nul points with his song Eins, Zwei, Drei

programme.title: Kidnapped by My Mum
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of Alex Batty, who went missing when he was 11 on what was supposed to be a short family holiday with his mother and grandfather. Now aged 20, he tells the full story about his abduction and his life on the run, retracing the route of his disappearance across Spain and France, uncovering not just how he was hidden but the belief system that kept him there

programme.title: Freddie Flintoff's Field of Dreams
programme.desc: As they reach the halfway point on the tour, some of the group start to struggle and the success of the trip is thrown into question. Freddie prepares the boys for their toughest cricket match so far and smarten them up for a prestigious event with members of Kolkata's high society

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: The disappearance of 17-year-old Andie Bell has haunted the town of Little Kilton for five years, a confessional text pointed the blame at her boyfriend Sal after he took his own life. Now, inquisitive teenage amateur sleuth Pip Fitz-Amobi is determined to clear his name and get to the bottom of what really happened. Crime drama based on the novel by Holly Jackson, starring Emma Myers and Zain Iqbal

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Now a team, Pip and Ravi turn their attention to Andie's best friends and find out Andie had a secret life that Sal was unhappy about. Meanwhile, Pip receives an anonymous warning. Crime drama, starring Emma Myers and Zain Iqbal

programme.title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, Pip seeks out a calamity party with hopes of tracking down the drug dealer Max told her about. Ravi is sceptical about the plan but she's determined to see it through with the help of Cara and Lauren

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's news

programme.title: Dance Race
programme.desc: New Zealand choreographer Corey Baker's short film which a range of dancers, from ballet and Strictly stars to choreographed skydivers and drivers, race across the UK to meet Lady G

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is in Brazil searching for the jaguar, the world's most elusive big cat. He sees them swimming, meets mothers and cubs, and even witnesses one hunting a caiman

programme.title: Despicable Me 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Dismissed from the Anti-Villain League after botching a mission, Gru sets off to meet his long-lost twin brother for one final criminal mission. Animated sequel, with the voices of Steve Carell, Kristen Wiig, Trey Parker and Miranda Cosgrove

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team find themselves split between Saint Marie and the island of Saint Auguste, attempting to investigate the mysterious death of a British tourist. When the team uncover a series of startling connections between the victim and other guests at the hotel they were staying at, they realise nothing is quite what it seems in this case. Neville prepares to make a huge next step in his life, and a familiar face returns

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Comedy about a proud gang of LGBTQ+ friends in Middlesbrough. Dickie, Mam, Lucinda and Sal throw a surprise coming-out party for Stewart at Keith's World of Carpets, which turns into a venture in wonderland. Written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell and Monica Dolan

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: The queens get Stewart ready for his first date - and decide to invite themselves along as well. Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Elijah Young, Mark Benton and Alexandra Mardell

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous: The Movie (2016)
programme.desc: Worried about her finances when her book fails to find a publisher, Patsy is given the tip that Kate Moss has left her PR company and will be looking for new representation. Things start to go awry when the plot to approach the model goes horribly wrong and Patsy and Edina find themselves vilified by the entire nation and have to flee the country. Comedy based on the BBC sitcom, starring Jennifer Saunders, Joanna Lumley and Julia Sawalha

Carwyn Blayney, Will Owen, Omari Douglas, Jess Carrivick and Alfie Dundas take to the stage in a bid to impress judges Priya Hall, Harriet Dyer and Fatiha El-Ghorri

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Very average woman Spud cooks, cleans, serves and cares for her father. The only problem is she does it all rather badly - and half-heartedly. A woman who is never seen, unattractive and ignored, she does not feel bad about herself. However, when her father dies, she starts to realise she may have to come out from the shadow and be seen. Comedy drama, written by and starring Siobhán McSweeney

programme.title: Smoggie Queens

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor becomes convinced that a mysterious creature always just out of sight is the root cause of everyone's childhood fears, and resolves to track it down. Dragging Clara away from a disastrous date with new work colleague Danny Pink, he goes in search of answers. Their pursuit of the creature through time takes them to the end of the universe, but also to Danny's childhood

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison realises that Kitty's fond memories of her sister conceal a darker truth, and tries to help her come to terms with her past. The rest of the ghosts fear that getting Kitty to open up will just be traumatic for everyone - but end up sharing some unresolved issues of their own. Mike resorts to witchcraft in a bid to see the ghosts for himself

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison spends more time with Lucy and starts planning to make a big investment - but the Captain and Kitty uncover something suspicious, and need Fanny's newfound sleuthing skills to get to the bottom of the mystery before it is too late. Thomas works on his football skills with a little help form Humphrey's head, and Julian lends an unseen helping hand to Mike's promo film

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: A spate of local burglaries prompts Agnes to increase her home security, fitting a bolt to the back door and a state-of-the-art alarm system provided by Buster Brady. If only he didn't get all his gear off the back of a van. The bank manager refuses Dermot a business loan so his mum becomes determined to make the money for him - by winning the local poker tournament, which means going up against arch-rival and reigning champion Hillary. Cathy is feeling broody and decides to pursue unconventional means to get pregnant. Agnes is left reeling at her announcement - but a lovelorn Buster sees it as an opportunity

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: When a handsome man appears in Foley's Pub, everyone presumes he must have set his attentions on Cathy. However, the stranger reveals he only has eyes for one very special woman - none other than Agnes Brown. Will the doting mum-of-six agree to go on her first date in donkey's years? And if she does, who is in for the bigger surprise - Agnes or the stranger? Comedy, written by and starring Brendan O'Carroll, with Dermot O'Neill, Danny O'Carroll and Jennifer Gibney

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Alex Murphy. Conor and Jock finally reunite after Jock makes a lucky escape from the Colombian prison and becomes a stowaway on a ship bound for Cork

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The lads decide it's time to expand their empire in Cork city, as their days of doing all the hard work are over - they plan on being the bosses now. Starring Alex Murphy and Hilary Rose

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor's one true love Linda Walsh is getting married to another man, which can only lead to chaos at the wedding. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy

programme.title: Chloe Ayling: My Unbelievable Kidnapping
programme.desc: The model shares the story of her 2017 abduction and tries to come to terms with what took place, the media reaction and why many people refused to believe her. Alongside Chloe's unfolding account of what happened, the series features archive footage and testimony from her former agent, detectives from the Italian and British police, the Italian legal team and the judge in the kidnappers' trial

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet struggles to make the right decision when Gaz confesses his love to her. On discovering Gaz's relationship with Janet, Donna vandalises his van - but has an affair of her own to hide. Meanwhile, Munch tries to find a suitable birthing expert to help Louise

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet twists Gaz's arm into having a romantic night in with her after he suggests going out and letting his former girlfriend babysit Corinthian. However, the mood turns sour when the couple begin to disagree over Jonny, prompting Gaz to make a big commitment

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Louise struggles with her duties as a mum - leaving her baby behind whenever she goes out - and receives much-needed advice from Tim. Meanwhile, Janet is unsure about Donna's new boyfriend. Comedy, starring Sheridan Smith and Natalie Casey

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet responds to being mugged by becoming a police community support officer. Wesley returns to the area intent on seeking advice from Gaz on the best way to win Donna's heart, while Louise runs into problems as she tries to find a father figure for her daughter. Comedy, starring Sheridan Smith, Will Mellor, Thomas Nelstrop and Kathryn Drysdale

programme.title: BBC New Comedy Awards
programme.desc: The ultimate hunt for the best British comic begins as 30 hopefuls battle it out across six heats to earn a place in the final, where one will be crowned the BBC New Comedian of 2025. programme.title: BBC New Comedy Awards
programme.desc: Nationwide search to find the best new stand-up talent in the UK

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The designers pair up to create uplifting spaces for a homelessness charity in London, tackling an arts and crafts room, a group workshop room, a wellness area and an employment suite. The charity's ambassador, Dara Ó Briain, joins Alan to check in on the designers, before Michelle Ogundehin and guest judge Sophie Robinson critique the spaces

programme.title: The Cage
programme.desc: Matty flails as Ning continues to push him. Meanwhile, Leanne and Gary bond, until he pressures her to betray Matty to safeguard her family

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps Carol, who wants a home near the sea in south-west Wales for her and her husband. Accompanied by her son Greg, Carol dreams of a picture-perfect double-fronted house with roses around the door. Can Nicki deliver the property she's after?

programme.title: Great Central Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's railway tour through Uzbekistan continues in the lush oasis surrounding the historic city of Samarkand. Here, he uncovers the Central Asian origins of the apple, a fruit that travelled to Europe along the Silk Road. Boarding a high-speed train along the old Trans-Caspian Railway, Michael also hears how the Russians toiled to build this remarkable line through the shifting sands of Uzbekistan's steppe

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie heads to Kent, where he meets soon-to-be-grandmother Tracey and suggests to her that borrowing a pet might lower her blood pressure. He explains how spending time with animals has been proven to boost happiness, improve wellbeing and lower the risk of dying from cardiovascular disease

programme.title: Ronan Keating's Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan completes this leg of his journey along Ireland's Wild Atlantic in County Derry/Londonderry. He walks the 400-year-old walls of the city of Derry/Londonderry with comedian Diona Doherty. He also hits the farm to find out what it takes to be a competitive sheep herder, before heading for the windswept coastline of Castlerock to meet a skilled craft worker who builds traditional coracle boats by hand

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Political Thinking with Nick Robinson
programme.desc: The journalist in conversation with people who influence our political thinking about what has shaped theirs

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts the game show in which 24 recurring contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single 'impossible' answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: Mastermind
programme.desc: Clive Myrie presents the fifth heat of the classic quiz in which contenders take on the famous black chair under the glare of the spotlight and the ticking clock in an attempt to become the next Mastermind Champion. Tonight's specialist subjects are Marie Curie, The BBC sitcom Ghosts, Elizabeth Woodville, and Banksy

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts the quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.title: Clean It, Fix It
programme.desc: A woman living in a one-bedroom flat in London needs more space, so the team turns her tired and unloved courtyard into an extra living area with some clever storage solutions

programme.title: Super Smart Animals
programme.desc: Part two of two. Liz Bonnin concludes her search for animal intelligence as she encounters grey whales that can display emotions. She also meets Caribbean monkeys able to outwit humans, and communicates with a chimp. The programme also explores the behaviour of Seattle's crows, how bright dogs are capable of learning up to 1,000 words, and why Asian elephants spend hours looking at their reflections in giant mirrors

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and his band of experts value the wares of islanders on Shetland. An enamelled 18th-century glass, a Scottish pearl set in a gold ring and a portrait by celebrated railway artist Terence Cuneo are among the items that catch their eyes

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: At Tilbury Docks in Essex, antiques experts Elizabeth Talbot and Philip Serrell search for items to take off to auction. Elizabeth finds a mint toy car collection, and Philip unearths a trench periscope from the First World War. Plus, Paul Martin uncovers the explosive history of Britain's biggest gunpowder factory

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Deirdre O'Kane, Jay Rayner, Tessa Sanderson and Iwan Thomas test their general knowledge skills in a final round of challenges before the winner picks up that trophy

programme.title: Great Central Asian Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's railway adventure through Uzbekistan reaches its finale in the historic city of Bukhara. Amidst the medieval Islamic architecture, Michael goes in search of a centuries-old Jewish community. Later he grapples with Kurash, an ancient form of upright wrestling, and his exploration of Uzbekistan culminates in the vast Kyzylkum Desert

programme.title: Greatest Gardens with Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein
programme.desc: TV presenter and keen gardener Katie Piper joins Diarmuid and Carol to visit three more gardens. The judges head to Colin's surprising rustic garden in suburban Ballymena, before seeing how Adrienne has transformed two acres near the windswept Glenshane Pass in the foothills of the Sperrin Mountains. Their final stop is in Dromore, Co Down, where Julietta has created a garden designed with her young family in mind, including a wild meadow playground and a courtyard filled with edible plants

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Carole Baxter visits Glenarn, which has a fabulous collection of rhododendrons looking their best. Calum Clunie demonstrates how to take cuttings from a fuchsia, and there are ideas on how to manage a plot if you are unlucky enough to have club root in your vegetable patch

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don makes a start on planting up some of his spectacular summer containers. He's also got leeks to plant out and shares some advice on how to make your own fertiliser. Frances Tophill heads to Berkshire to learn more about biodynamic gardening and the benefits it can bring. It's also time for an update from Adam Frost's new garden, where things are slowly starting to take shape

programme.title: Hidden Treasures of the National Trust
programme.desc: A look at some of the UK's most beautiful and historic homes, and people who are saving the past for all of us. From a fragile silk robe and a wartime wall painting to a writer's handmade timepiece, the hidden treasures in two houses reveal the stories of two of Britain's most celebrated authors - and the expert teams racing to preserve them. Toby Jones narrates

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Sindhu Vee hosts this episode of the comedy showcase recorded before a packed house at London's Hammersmith Apollo, featuring stand-up performances by New York-based Edinburgh comedy award winner Alex Edelman, and the Edinburgh Festival Fringe Comedians' Choice Award winner Lou Sanders

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. With Matt Chorley

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.desc: Celebrity model couple Carl and Yaya are invited to join a luxury cruise populated by a rogues' gallery of super-rich passengers, including a Russian oligarch and British arms dealers, as well as an idiosyncratic, alcoholic, Marx-quoting captain. But a storm is brewing, and the cruise ends catastrophically. Comedy drama, starring Harris Dickinson, Charlbi Dean and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Hard-hitting drama written by and starring Richard Gadd - last seen in Netflix thriller Baby Reindeer - and charting the explosive friendship between two men over a 30-year period, since they were brought into each other's lives as youngsters through death and circumstance. In 1993, Niall is conflicted when asked by his mother to lie in court about Ruben's violence. He seems to have changed for the better, so the decision weighs heavily on him. Co-starring Jamie Bell, Marianne McIvor and Neve McIntosh

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty Don makes a start on planting up some of his spectacular summer containers. He's also got leeks to plant out and shares some advice on how to make your own fertiliser. Frances Tophill heads to Berkshire to learn more about biodynamic gardening and the benefits it can bring. It's also time for an update from Adam Frost's new garden, where things are slowly starting to take shape

programme.title: How to Marry a Millionaire (1953)
programme.desc: Three women rent a luxurious New York apartment as part of a scheme to get their claws into wealthy husbands - but their plans become unstuck when all three start to fall for men with good hearts and empty pockets. Comedy, starring Betty Grable, Marilyn Monroe, Lauren Bacall, William Powell, Cameron Mitchell, David Wayne, Rory Calhoun and Fred Clark

programme.title: Live Athletics
programme.desc: Coverage of the opening meeting of the campaign from China Textile City Sports Center in Shaoxing, China. Six meeting records fell here last year, including a clearance of 6.11m by dominant Swedish pole-vaulter Armand Duplantis and an American sprint hurdles double courtesy of Cordell Tinch and Grace Stark

programme.title: Andi Oliver's Fabulous Feasts
programme.desc: Andi visits the seaside and harbour town of Bridlington in East Yorkshire, where she plans to throw a party to secure the future of its historic fishing industry. Andi takes a group of local teenagers on a fishing trip to convince them to sign up for a career on the high seas, and comes up with a shellfish feast that appeals to all, using regional produce

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary following the grizzly bears of the Alaskan wilderness as they come out of hibernation and are thrust together in a frenzy of feeding, fighting and mating. The opening programme introduces first-time grizzly mum Parsnip and her young cub Pushki. Only half of bear cubs make it through the season and they are both struggling to survive in the unforgiving region, which is ruled by massive male Van and his aggressive partner Alice - for whom Parsnip's youngster would make a good meal. Narrated by Billy Connolly

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A young canine-loving couple from Hertfordshire are hoping for a fresh start in a new High Weald home. Their budget is £600,000, so presenter Ginny Buckley soon rustles up some tempting properties to show them. Away from the houses, Ginny picks some of the local grape harvest before treating herself to a glass of fizz

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin presents from Capesthorne Hall in Cheshire as hundreds of visitors arrive with their family heirlooms and the experts pick out the best items to go off to auction. Paul also investigates the history of nearby Quarrybank Mill

programme.desc: Acting friends Peter Gunn and Melanie Hill join experts James Braxton and David Harper on a search through Staffordshire and Derbyshire to find antiques to sell at auction

programme.title: Darkest Hour (2017)
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: Their Finest (2016)
programme.desc: Former secretary Catrin Cole, newly appointed by the British Ministry of Information as a scriptwriter for propaganda films, joins the cast and crew of a major production while the Blitz rages around them. Comedy drama, starring Gemma Arterton, Sam Claflin, Richard E Grant and Bill Nighy

programme.title: LGBTQ+ Hits at the BBC
programme.desc: Performances by stars whose sex and sexuality is central to their careers and the songs they've created, including George Michael, Boy George, Freddie Mercury, Beth Ditto, MNEK, Lil Nas X and Barry Manilow. Some pushed boundaries and challenged gender stereotypes from the very start, while others only revealed their true selves after years of success and speculation, but all have played their part in changing the world of popular music

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: Shannon and Dylan finally spend time together. He wants to mend their relationship, but she is not ready to listen, until a journey into his past helps her understand. Meanwhile, a different side of Ollie comes to light as she encounters an old foe. programme.title: Mint

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Glastonbury in Somerset is today's location, where Henry Cole fashions a quirky lamp out of traffic lights and Simon O'Brien makes a Flintstones-style table out of old roof tiles

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: Anneli, the manager of a restored medieval village in France, is having a tricky time setting up the last wedding party of the season. Elsewhere, the owners of a French hamlet celebrate their first restored building. Finally, passionate estate agent Mark spends his life hunting derelict villages in Galicia

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Rory Bremner joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps a couple from Derbyshire to find a holiday home on Spain's Orihuela Costa, with at least three bedrooms to accommodate all the family, plus a communal pool

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Sidhbh and Neasa launch their new Miami clinic with a party in an operating theatre and a signature cocktail. They hope other local plastic surgeons will book the space for their own operations to help pay off some of its multi-million-dollar cost. Tony and Keegan head to Florida's original theme park to film a review for their YouTube channel and try out some new filming techniques

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul need a winch to complete their huge balcony installation in Brittany. Jane and Rory have a smashing time in their gîte kitchen at Château de Pican, and near Cognac, Sarah and George use their antiques expertise for another wedding

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Steve and Shaun Garner are house-hunting with fellow Brummies Janice and Stephen, who after long careers in healthcare deserve a permanent break from work in sun-soaked Almería

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Sahar Zand reports from the Philippines on the controversial world of spiritual healers. Across the country, with high medical costs and difficulties accessing healthcare, patients put their trust in alternative treatments to cure anything from chronic pain to cancer. Faith healers, blending Catholic rituals with centuries-old traditions, promise miraculous recoveries through prayer, herbal remedies and psychic surgery. Their clinics attract patients from across this country of 112 million people, and even overseas. Sahar meets families placing their hopes in these treatments, including those who've turned away from conventional medicine. Some say they've witnessed extraordinary recoveries, crediting healers with saving their lives. On the outskirts of Manilla, three faith healers who claim to treat over 100 people per week believe they've been divinely chosen to cure conditions modern medicine can't detect. But critics warn that the industry is dangerously unregulated. Medical professionals fear that patients are being misled, delaying vital treatment, often fatally. She hears from people who believe that their loved ones paid the ultimate price for putting their trust in miracle cures that they now believe were a scam. With faith healers operating across the country, authorities face mounting pressure to act, but regulation remains limited in a country where faith runs deep

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks
programme.desc: Comedian Chris McCausland joins Alexander on three monumental Monmouthshire pub walks through the Wye Valley where they explore castles and ruins, picnic like a Georgian gentleman and climb a holy mountain. As they make their way from pub to pub, Chris tells Xander his remarkable life story and shares emotional insights into his private life, as he discusses his blindness, his family, his career and the other people's expectations of him

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Social activist Aaron is paired with youth worker and nightclub host Nathan - and while they might seem like strangers, their date leads to a twist neither of them is expecting. Former mayor Tracey meets toilet roll salesman Stuart, while barber Verity is paired with 6ft 5 Mancunian coach driver Liam. Burlesque dancer Double D, aka Deborah, is ready to steal the show, and maybe someone's heart. Her date Lee seems like the perfect match - a professional singer who is hoping to turn his solo act into a romantic duet

programme.title: The Last Duel (2021)
programme.desc: In medieval France, squire Jacques Le Gris secures a captaincy destined for knight Jean de Carrouges. To rub salt into fresh wounds, Jacques' promotion includes land intended for his rival. Jean canters off to war and returns to his wife Marguerite, who claims she was sexually assaulted by Jacques. Ridley Scott's epic drama based on a book by Eric Jager, starring Adam Driver, Jodie Comer, and Matt Damon and Ben Affleck (who also worked on the screenplay)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill gets creative with a series of spoons. Kumail Nanjiani impresses everyone with his extraordinarily strong jaw and Alex Horne causes Joanna Page to scream in such terror that it sparks alarm in the local area. Armando Iannucci douses a coconut in vinegar, while Joel Dommett slathers another in glue. Greg Davies hands out the points

programme.title: How to Build a Girl (2019)
programme.desc: A 16-year-old living in Wolverhampton finds comfort in placing portraits of her media idols covering her bedroom wall. She dreams of escaping her humdrum circumstances by becoming a writer, and manages to secure a trial as a music journalist. Eager to reinvent herself, she adopts a new style, bright red hair and an outlandish pen name. In due course she realises that cruel reviews offer a pathway to success allowing her to support her family financially. Drama based on Caitlin Moran's memoir, with Beanie Feldstein, Cleo and Donal Finn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Danny does some gardening work for Carrie's gynaecologist - but she thinks the doctor might refuse to see her as a patient when she learns how much her friend overcharged him. Guest starring Judge Reinhold

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie hears her law firm is laying people off and begins to worry about her job, while Doug lands himself in the doghouse by losing Deacon's lucky ball. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Victor Williams

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie cooks Thanksgiving dinner for 10 people, while Doug takes pity on a stranger who has been left waiting for a lift - but his good intentions backfire. With Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is made unemployed and initially shows no inclination to find another job. Finally stung into action by a confrontation with Doug, she decides to join Arthur in a new business venture - making mobile phone covers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie hatch an elaborate plan to get Amy back with Robert - but only succeed in driving her into the arms of an all-too-eager Gianni

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones watch Geoffrey having trouble getting the hang of a game, but Ray learns the hard way that his son's lack of ability should not interfere with his enjoyment

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's divorced parents join the Barones for Thanksgiving - but her father puts a damper on the festivities by bringing a date. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Brad Garrett and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The prospect of Christmas with his son Frederick leaves Frasier panicking about what presents to buy him, and it takes a reminder from Martin about the festive spirit to keep him on the right track

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: The psychiatrist realises the true depth of his feelings for station manager Kate, only for her to announce she is moving to Chicago. Kelsey Grammer and Mercedes Ruehl star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist suddenly realises he has a shortage of friends in Seattle, as most of his old ones are back in Boston. He announces on air he is looking for companionship and gets a lot more than he bargained for. Guest starring Griffin Dunne, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Joe spends the night in Daphne's room, causing a shocked Frasier's mind to work overtime and Niles to become consumed by jealousy. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You (1999)
programme.desc: Lively teenager Bianca is not allowed to start dating until her man-hating sister Kat does first - but no boy is brave enough to ask her out. However, Bianca's would-be boyfriend thinks he has found the perfect man for the job in the shape of a quirky loner with a mysterious past. Comedy, based on Shakespeare's The Taming of the Shrew, starring Heath Ledger, Julia Stiles, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Larisa Oleynik

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This week's competition kicks off at The Sportsman in Whitworth, Lancashire, where Steve and Georgia are hoping to win over their guests with bargain rooms and big breakfasts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah hosts the second visit of the week at Lahtle Wood Glamping in North Yorkshire, where she is joined in her duties by her sister-in-law, also called Sarah. The B&Bers find themselves cooing over the cabins when they pitch up, but Steve and Georgia aren't sure about the value. After a visit to an old air raid shelter, Steve drops some truth bombs on the other B&Bers about what he really thinks about the accommodation. Come feedback time, the Sarahs contend with some difficult comments about prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Joe hosts the third visit of the week, at the stately, Grade II listed Cley Hall Hotel in Lincolnshire. The B&Bers find themselves steeped in history, before letting out some anger as they try out blacksmithing but a noisy night drives Paul to distraction, and both the Sarahs get a little too hot under the collar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Bumble Barn Luxury B&B in Norfolk, where professional chef Paul and co-worker Debbie are looking to cook up a storm. Following a history lesson at an RAF museum, Paul indulges his guests by namedropping some of the illustrious people he's cooked for in the past. With expectations through the roof for breakfast, the pressure is on for him to deliver. However, some brutal feedback leaves Paul sharpening his extensive collection of knives ahead of Payment Day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees backstabbing, blazing barneys, explosive confrontations and plenty of vendettas to settle. Steve and Georgia aren't happy with their breakfast scores, the Sarahs are angry about their hot tub's frosty reception, Joe's tossing and turning about his sleep scores, and Paul is ready to take everyone to task about some low blows in his feedback. When the dust settles, the winner is finally revealed

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shares more barbecue ideas, serving up a butterflied leg of lamb with herby breadcrumb crust, accompanied by creamy beans and leeks - all cooked directly on the coals. He then makes spiced chicken kebabs and creamy butter sauce, grilled fish tacos, paired with a charred fruit salsa, and his tear-and-share vegetable pancake

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Paul Middleton is on the footplate of a North Yorkshire Moors Railway locomotive, travelling between the picturesque stops of Goathland and Levisham. Meanwhile, iconic engine Tornado is brought in on a mission to boost passenger numbers, the lineside team are in action monitoring the UK's only venomous snake, and we see how a Victorian loom is keeping heritage railways all over the world running smoothly

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Featuring a South African nature reserve, Classic railway carriages repurposed as a luxury hotel in Kent, and curious submarine accommodation in the Scottish Highlands. An old freight crane is reborn as a harbour-side hotel in Hamburg, and there's a retro retreat in Utah, featuring wagons that never roll

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Glass (2019)
programme.desc: An invulnerable vigilante battles a murderer with multiple personalities - only for both to be apprehended and transferred to a psychiatric hospital. They find themselves under the care of a sinister doctor who has plans concerning their unique abilities, but also sharing the facility with a third patient, a criminal mastermind the crime fighter had encountered before, and who is soon manipulating everyone to his own ends. M Night Shyamalan's fantasy thriller, crossing over the characters from his earlier films Unbreakable and Split. Starring James McAvoy, Bruce Willis and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mum's funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill gets creative with a series of spoons. Kumail Nanjiani impresses everyone with his extraordinarily strong jaw and Alex Horne causes Joanna Page to scream in such terror that it sparks alarm in the local area. Armando Iannucci douses a coconut in vinegar, while Joel Dommett slathers another in glue. Greg Davies hands out the points

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The group explore how basic skills can transform intimacy. In the workshop, they practise kissing, which is exciting for some but daunting for others. Ellen gets naked with surrogate partner Kat, but struggles with intimate touch. Alex and Joy aim to finally conquer their individual issues as their relationship grows closer, while Shelby unlocks Millie's buried emotions and desires

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south-west London compete for the £1,000 prize, beginning with butchers Roland and Anne. Second host Penny hopes that her organisational skills can help her gain points, but partner Thom's revelation threatens to embarrass her. Fancy-dress enthusiasts Tony and Rebecca host the final evening, with a dessert based on Tower Bridge and a starter resembling a rugby pitch

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Horse Box, Milk Float and Balancing Barn
programme.desc: The architect meets a woman who wants to build a shop and a mobile home out of an old horsebox on a budget of just £500, and a couple creating a holiday let from a 1960s milk float. He also visits a remarkable 100ft-long balancing barn and makes plans for a rectangular pod for his tree house in the grounds of Northumberland's Kielder National Park

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: James and Jodie set out to renovate an old dairy farm's dilapidated farmhouse. However, given it is such an overwhelming challenge it is difficult to know where to start

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Rory Bremner joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner on the words-and-numbers game, chaired by Colin Murray

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane decide to get married, but have very different ideas over what sort of engagement ring to buy. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam clashes with Nick, who then devises a cunning plan for revenge, using Diane as a pawn. American comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Never Love a Goalie - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Carla worries that her affection for Boston Bruins goalie Eddie LeBec may be affecting his play. Comedy, with Rhea Perlman and guest star Jay Thomas

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and the family attend an open day at the twins' school, during which first-grader Michael shocks and embarrasses them by reading out a story obviously based on their constant bickering

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank becomes jealous when Marco begins spending time with Marie, and insists they end their friendship. His actions get the backing of Ray, who does not approve of married women having male pals - especially not his mother. Starring Ray Romano and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray loses his wedding ring and is propositioned by an attractive woman at the airport, so a jealous Debra decides to get her own back - with disastrous results. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is up for a prestigious title at his wine club and offers to host the next tasting in his apartment. Determined to get everything just right, he hires contractors to fix a scratch on the floor - then watches in horror as they wreck the place. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. A miserly pay rise for staff prompts Frasier to cross swords with station manager Kate, but a meeting between the two sees them engage in more than negotiations as emotions are put to the test. Comedy, guest starring Mercedes Ruehl

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Part two of two. Kate and Frasier decide to take their relationship slowly, until their passion gets the better of them in the radio booth and their steamy encounter is broadcast over the airwaves - leaving the whole of Seattle trying to work out the identity of 'dirty girl'. Comedy, guest starring Mercedes Ruehl, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Last Time I Saw Maris
programme.desc: Niles reaches the end of his tether with Maris, and decides to retaliate - but she turns the tables by throwing him out and asking for a divorce. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie cooks Thanksgiving dinner for 10 people, while Doug takes pity on a stranger who has been left waiting for a lift - but his good intentions backfire. With Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones watch Geoffrey having trouble getting the hang of a game, but Ray learns the hard way that his son's lack of ability should not interfere with his enjoyment

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The prospect of Christmas with his son Frederick leaves Frasier panicking about what presents to buy him, and it takes a reminder from Martin about the festive spirit to keep him on the right track

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: The psychiatrist realises the true depth of his feelings for station manager Kate, only for her to announce she is moving to Chicago. Kelsey Grammer and Mercedes Ruehl star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist suddenly realises he has a shortage of friends in Seattle, as most of his old ones are back in Boston. He announces on air he is looking for companionship and gets a lot more than he bargained for. Guest starring Griffin Dunne, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Joe spends the night in Daphne's room, causing a shocked Frasier's mind to work overtime and Niles to become consumed by jealousy. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns realises he has no heir and decides to hold auditions, intending to choose one from the children of Springfield. Unfortunately, only Bart comes close to fitting the bill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer begins to believe Ned Flanders may not be so bad after all, and starts hanging around with him - but his friendliness and good cheer are not reciprocated for long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart wins a competition and becomes the lucky owner of a fully grown elephant, which proceeds to eat his hard-up family out of house and home

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You (1999)
programme.desc: Lively teenager Bianca is not allowed to start dating until her man-hating sister Kat does first - but no boy is brave enough to ask her out. However, Bianca's would-be boyfriend thinks he has found the perfect man for the job in the shape of a quirky loner with a mysterious past. Comedy, based on Shakespeare's The Taming of the Shrew, starring Heath Ledger, Julia Stiles, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Larisa Oleynik

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This week's competition kicks off at The Sportsman in Whitworth, Lancashire, where Steve and Georgia are hoping to win over their guests with bargain rooms and big breakfasts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah hosts the second visit of the week at Lahtle Wood Glamping in North Yorkshire, where she is joined in her duties by her sister-in-law, also called Sarah. The B&Bers find themselves cooing over the cabins when they pitch up, but Steve and Georgia aren't sure about the value. After a visit to an old air raid shelter, Steve drops some truth bombs on the other B&Bers about what he really thinks about the accommodation. Come feedback time, the Sarahs contend with some difficult comments about prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Joe hosts the third visit of the week, at the stately, Grade II listed Cley Hall Hotel in Lincolnshire. The B&Bers find themselves steeped in history, before letting out some anger as they try out blacksmithing but a noisy night drives Paul to distraction, and both the Sarahs get a little too hot under the collar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Bumble Barn Luxury B&B in Norfolk, where professional chef Paul and co-worker Debbie are looking to cook up a storm. Following a history lesson at an RAF museum, Paul indulges his guests by namedropping some of the illustrious people he's cooked for in the past. With expectations through the roof for breakfast, the pressure is on for him to deliver. However, some brutal feedback leaves Paul sharpening his extensive collection of knives ahead of Payment Day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees backstabbing, blazing barneys, explosive confrontations and plenty of vendettas to settle. Steve and Georgia aren't happy with their breakfast scores, the Sarahs are angry about their hot tub's frosty reception, Joe's tossing and turning about his sleep scores, and Paul is ready to take everyone to task about some low blows in his feedback. When the dust settles, the winner is finally revealed

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shares more barbecue ideas, serving up a butterflied leg of lamb with herby breadcrumb crust, accompanied by creamy beans and leeks - all cooked directly on the coals. He then makes spiced chicken kebabs and creamy butter sauce, grilled fish tacos, paired with a charred fruit salsa, and his tear-and-share vegetable pancake

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Steam Train Diaries
programme.desc: Paul Middleton is on the footplate of a North Yorkshire Moors Railway locomotive, travelling between the picturesque stops of Goathland and Levisham. Meanwhile, iconic engine Tornado is brought in on a mission to boost passenger numbers, the lineside team are in action monitoring the UK's only venomous snake, and we see how a Victorian loom is keeping heritage railways all over the world running smoothly

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Featuring a South African nature reserve, Classic railway carriages repurposed as a luxury hotel in Kent, and curious submarine accommodation in the Scottish Highlands. An old freight crane is reborn as a harbour-side hotel in Hamburg, and there's a retro retreat in Utah, featuring wagons that never roll

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: The Last Duel (2021)
programme.desc: In medieval France, squire Jacques Le Gris secures a captaincy destined for knight Jean de Carrouges. To rub salt into fresh wounds, Jacques' promotion includes land intended for his rival. Jean canters off to war and returns to his wife Marguerite, who claims she was sexually assaulted by Jacques. Ridley Scott's epic drama based on a book by Eric Jager, starring Adam Driver, Jodie Comer, and Matt Damon and Ben Affleck (who also worked on the screenplay)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith take the chosen singers into the studio to rehearse for the final concert. But first, they decide to include a fifth singer. Who should they bring back? As the practice sessions begin, Milo must learn to be bigger on stage, Chantel battles with self-doubt, Findlay rehearses his mum's funeral song a year after her death and Mina starts losing her voice the day before the concert. Alison Hammond follows their progress

programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding, while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa seeks advice from an unlikely source

The pair begin their journey in Los Angeles, and head down to Muscle Beach to lift weights, before taking part in a game of volleyball. The following day, Bradley is terrified to hear that the agenda involves a 14,000ft skydive

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Actor Bradley Walsh and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. In the second leg of their journey, the pair leave the city of Los Angeles behind and make their way down the famous Route 66 to the southwestern state of Arizona. Here, they ride through a deserted ghost town, before the father and son reach Lake Havasu City, where Barney has arranged for them to try jet-skiing. Finally, they attend a Cowboy College, where they learn to become real-life horsemen

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney arrive in Texas, where they enjoy driving around in tanks, experience space travel in a centrifuge and hear campfire tales about UFOs. First up, the pair undertake some centrifuge training, which is used to prepare astronauts for the crushing gravitational forces produced at take-off from the extreme exhilaration. They also head to the outskirts of Houston to meet some UFO enthusiasts who investigate claimed sightings of extra-terrestrials, and are gripped by stories of spaceships blocking roads and people being taken by aliens for experiments

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney embark on the final leg of their journey, which sees the pair arrive in the Louisiana city of New Orleans. Here, they visit a spiritual voodoo priest for a spot of energy cleansing, and feed alligators in the Bayou with Captain Billy, who knows every corner of the wetlands, having been born and raised on the bayous of South Louisiana. Later, Bradley hops on board the Natchez jazz Steamboat, before the pair take to the streets to lead a spectacular parade with a six-piece band

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friend's 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joey's agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Miss Hoover asks her students to research their family history, Lisa is distressed to discover that most of her forebears seem to have been crooks and deadbeats. Then she finds an old diary in the attic that was written by her ancestor, Eliza Simpson, and describes a remarkable 19th-century adventure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides to steal a kiss from his crush at school after taking advice from Grampa, but the plan backfires when she reacts in disgust. With the guest voices of Angela Bassett and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Love and loyalty win when Lainey comes home, and Adam and Carmen come to a crossroads in their relationship. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party-loving Jake plans his wedding to image-conscious bride-to-be Rosie, who dreams of a more intimate affair

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia

The creations must be large enough to fill the shop window and grab passers-by's attention. One hundred members of the public, including guest judge Sophie Monk, will vote for the winning build, with two Big Bricks up for grabs

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The top five teams join the circus in Cambodia's second-largest city, Siem Reap. Bicycles prove harder to ride than anticipated, before a fiddly final challenge to craft silk from lotus flowers brings mud, sweat and tears. Also, one team melt down as they face an arduous extra task that jeopardises their place in the final four

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
