programme.title: Ireland in Music
programme.desc: Muireann Bradley impresses Denise Chaila in the Solstice Arts Centre, Navan, as she brings blues music to a new audience. The teenager tells Denise of her approach to kickboxing, and how it keeps stage fright at bay as she prepares the take on the world from her base in Ballybofey, Co Donegal

programme.title: Conversations with Friends
programme.desc: As Frances and Nick grow closer things become tense between Bobbi and Frances, as Bobbi senses a change in her friend. A visit from Melissa's agent raises tensions in the villa

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Desi makes a stand, Marty puts his body on the line, and Dawn finds a kindred spirit

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Eden and Abigail try to find out what's going on between Levi and Mackenzie. Brax fixes a broken baby monitor, which displays footage of a woman placing drugs beneath Archie's cot

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark tries to fake being healthy after falling ill the day he is supposed to meet the Pope, and a rival radio station tries to tempt Mike Jr away from VOCM, breaking Mike Sr's heart

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the last leg of his railway journey around the north-west coast of England, visiting the childhood home of William Wordsworth in Cockermouth, Cumbria, and ending in Maryport, where the Solway Firth marks the border between England and Scotland

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo joins the hunt for dark matter in the deepest mine in Britain in Boulby, North Yorkshire, then visits Middlesbrough's Transporter Bridge, which offers high views over the Tees estuary and the Cleveland Hills. At Saltholme, Michael joins the RSPB in a hide to observe a visiting bird of prey

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: The annual flood arrives in the Okavango Delta, bringing new prey and challenges for the big cats. Gordon Buchanan follows the hungry lion mothers as they hunt buffalo, while eldest cub Mathata learns to avoid this formidable prey. Anna Dimitriadis tracks a skinny young cheetah struggling to catch food in the changing landscape and Brad Bestelink follows a pregnant leopard looking for a den as rising flood waters push dangerous males into her territory

programme.title: Ann (2021)
programme.desc: On January 31, 1984, a teenager awakens to realise that she is going to have a baby. Having left the house early, Ann scurries around to find somewhere to hide, lost and frightened. Writer/director Ciaran Creagh's dramatisation of the real-life story of Ann Lovett, a 15-year-old girl who died in childbirth in a grotto in Granard, Co. Longford in 1984. Starring Zara Devlin, Ian Beattie and Eileen Walsh

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: The Rumour
programme.desc: A shocking turn of events sparks a storm of blame and Bea, distraught, accuses Joanna of causing it all. Shaken, Joanna decides to move back home with Alfie. At school, the tension shifts as Debbie unexpectedly apologises. The town believes Sonia to be Sally McGowan and suspicion mounts while secrets unravel, and Joanna is left questioning

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy is forced to bring an old enemy back to Harlem to deal with Joe Colombo. Omar uncovers the name of one of Malcolm's shooters as the Panthers launch their investigation, and Mayme receives an invitation to Truman Capote's famed Black and White Ball. Drama, starring Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Abigail has suggested that Lacey pursue another news article, Dana and Sonny are feeling positive after his foot has moved, and Eden and Levi discuss Abigail and Mali's breakup

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Leah and Justin brainstorm ways to help his mechanic business, Sonny and Dana are back on track with their relationship, and the reality of Archie's dad being in prison hits Harper

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jo is unsure if she can handle a relationship with Tane now he's in prison, David interviews Brax, and Justin gets permission from Remi and Eden to take back the Lyrik van

programme.title: Against the Wild: The Great Elephant Adventure (2018)
programme.desc: A lost orphan boy and a giant elephant team up to take down a poaching syndicdate. Drama, starring Sam Ashe Arnold, Elizabeth Hurley and Richard Lukunku

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Colleagues from Colchester Zoo Lizzie, Kez, Mo and Sue compete for money by crossing a bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr bag another house for one euro, this time in the idyllic region of northern Tuscany. Alan purchases a dilapidated 17th-century house with a medieval watchtower in the rural hamlet of Fornovolasco, and ropes in Amanda to spend their summer transforming it into another Italian dream home. However, arriving at the property for the first time, they discover it's been left empty since the previous owner died and a massive restoration job lies ahead

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr take on their first project - transforming the old dining room into a Tuscan living room. After failing to reach an agreement on the colour scheme, the duo discover the windows of their 17th-century home are unsalvageable and must be made from scratch. Luckily another old feature can be saved, and with the help of Scott the DIY duo restore the original chestnut ceiling beams. Away from the work, the pair venture out into the Apuan Alps and face their fears - taking flight with a 1,500m long zip wire over the spectacular Lake Vagli

programme.title: Grand Designs: House of the Year
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud visits five houses praised for their use of materials and craftsmanship. A barn conversion in East Anglia, a minimal hymn to brick in Northern Ireland, an eco-terrace in London, a timber based eco-home in the Fens and an extension in Norwich. The winner of the RIBA House of the Year award is finally revealed

programme.title: UCL Magazine Show
programme.desc: Including reviews of recent Champions League matches, a round-up of the latest news, plus interviews with leading players and coaches

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti head to Rome to work at the Hassler, one of Europe's last remaining family owned 'grande dame' hotels. The duo learn about the hostelry's celebrity guests and plans for the future as they pitch in with everything from cooking traditional carbonara to sweeping the busy streets in front of the hotel

programme.title: Expedition Killer Whale
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at the hunting behaviours of killer whales in Antarctica, as a team of scientists and film-makers travel across freezing waters to find out more about these animals. Their mission is not only to deepen viewers' understanding of their hunting behaviours, but also to learn more about the more tender side of the killer whales

programme.title: My Epic Camel Adventure with Gordon Buchanan
programme.desc: The wildlife cameraman takes a ride through the Gobi desert, starting in the west of Mongolia and crossing blistering sand dunes, endless rocky plains and the treacherous Bumbat Mountain with only his camels for company. To succeed he must befriend the animals, learn as much as he can about them, and try to win their trust and respect, discovering how these creatures have evolved in the most unusual ways to survive and prosper in one of the most hostile environments on the planet

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: The Saturday Game
programme.desc: Damian Lawlor presents action from the latest GAA matches. The contests taking place included Galway v Dublin, Kilkenny v Kildare and Offaly v Wexford in the Leinster Senior Hurling Championship, and Tipperary v Clare in the Munster Senior Hurling Championship

programme.title: Camogie: Inside the Championship
programme.desc: Part one of two. Following the All Ireland Camogie Championship from start to finish, combining multiple teams and stories, witnessing heartbreak and triumph, culminating in a winner-takes-all climax at Croker

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo joins the hunt for dark matter in the deepest mine in Britain in Boulby, North Yorkshire, then visits Middlesbrough's Transporter Bridge, which offers high views over the Tees estuary and the Cleveland Hills. programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: The annual flood arrives in the Okavango Delta, bringing new prey and challenges for the big cats. Gordon Buchanan follows the hungry lion mothers as they hunt buffalo, while eldest cub Mathata learns to avoid this formidable prey. Anna Dimitriadis tracks a skinny young cheetah struggling to catch food in the changing landscape and Brad Bestelink follows a pregnant leopard looking for a den as rising flood waters push dangerous males into her territory

programme.title: Ann (2021)
programme.desc: On January 31, 1984, a teenager awakens to realise that she is going to have a baby. Having left the house early, Ann scurries around to find somewhere to hide, lost and frightened. Writer/director Ciaran Creagh's dramatisation of the real-life story of Ann Lovett, a 15-year-old girl who died in childbirth in a grotto in Granard, Co. Longford in 1984. Starring Zara Devlin, Ian Beattie and Eileen Walsh

programme.title: Against the Wild: The Great Elephant Adventure (2018)
programme.desc: A lost orphan boy and a giant elephant team up to take down a poaching syndicdate. Drama, starring Sam Ashe Arnold, Elizabeth Hurley and Richard Lukunku

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Colleagues from Colchester Zoo Lizzie, Kez, Mo and Sue compete for money by crossing a bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr bag another house for one euro, this time in the idyllic region of northern Tuscany. Alan purchases a dilapidated 17th-century house with a medieval watchtower in the rural hamlet of Fornovolasco, and ropes in Amanda to spend their summer transforming it into another Italian dream home. However, arriving at the property for the first time, they discover it's been left empty since the previous owner died and a massive restoration job lies ahead

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Italian Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr take on their first project - transforming the old dining room into a Tuscan living room. After failing to reach an agreement on the colour scheme, the duo discover the windows of their 17th-century home are unsalvageable and must be made from scratch. Luckily another old feature can be saved, and with the help of Scott the DIY duo restore the original chestnut ceiling beams. Away from the work, the pair venture out into the Apuan Alps and face their fears - taking flight with a 1,500m long zip wire over the spectacular Lake Vagli

programme.title: Grand Designs: House of the Year
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud visits five houses praised for their use of materials and craftsmanship. A barn conversion in East Anglia, a minimal hymn to brick in Northern Ireland, an eco-terrace in London, a timber based eco-home in the Fens and an extension in Norwich. The winner of the RIBA House of the Year award is finally revealed

programme.title: UCL Magazine Show
programme.desc: Including reviews of recent Champions League matches, a round-up of the latest news, plus interviews with leading players and coaches

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti head to Rome to work at the Hassler, one of Europe's last remaining family owned 'grande dame' hotels. The duo learn about the hostelry's celebrity guests and plans for the future as they pitch in with everything from cooking traditional carbonara to sweeping the busy streets in front of the hotel

programme.title: Expedition Killer Whale
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at the hunting behaviours of killer whales in Antarctica, as a team of scientists and film-makers travel across freezing waters to find out more about these animals. Their mission is not only to deepen viewers' understanding of their hunting behaviours, but also to learn more about the more tender side of the killer whales

programme.title: My Epic Camel Adventure with Gordon Buchanan
programme.desc: The wildlife cameraman takes a ride through the Gobi desert, starting in the west of Mongolia and crossing blistering sand dunes, endless rocky plains and the treacherous Bumbat Mountain with only his camels for company. To succeed he must befriend the animals, learn as much as he can about them, and try to win their trust and respect, discovering how these creatures have evolved in the most unusual ways to survive and prosper in one of the most hostile environments on the planet

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: The Saturday Game
programme.desc: Damian Lawlor presents action from the latest GAA matches. The contests taking place included Galway v Dublin, Kilkenny v Kildare and Offaly v Wexford in the Leinster Senior Hurling Championship, and Tipperary v Clare in the Munster Senior Hurling Championship

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: The Korean War
programme.desc: Part one of two. Shedding new light on one of the most perilous episodes in post-war history, examining how and why its legacy - a tense stalemate - continues to this day. Beginning with 35 years of brutal Japanese occupation, a sudden and arbitrary division of the 1,000 year-old nation in 1945, followed by three more years of occupation by the USSR in the North and the US in the South

programme.title: The Traitors
programme.desc: After a shocking Round Table the previous evening, things get heated after breakfast, as speculations rise over a possible new Traitor. Focus and precision are needed if the Players intend on building the all-important prize pot and protecting themselves from murder. With the next Round Table looming, pressure mounts and bonds break. Claudia Winkleman monitors events, revealing the identity of the next hopeful having to fall on their sword

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Gemma, 30, once danced with Prince William and will settle for nothing less than her very own Prince Charming, while 43-year-old bricklayer and Arsenal fan Alfie wants to meet someone with whom he can start a family, but she can't be a Spurs supporter. Electrician Eddie, 21, didn't find a spark on his first visit to the hotel, so maitre d' Fred takes him under his wing as he arrives for another date, with nursery nurse Sophie

programme.desc: A couple driving through a rural location in the the Deep South discover that the police and judge of the town of Robertsville are more intent on extorting money from them than being honest servants of the people. With Richard Kiley and Walter Matthau

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: John Lennon - John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the making of John Lennon's first solo album John Lennon/Plastic Ono Band, which includes Mother, Love and Working Class Hero. The programme uncovers how themes of isolation, anger, religion and class were drawn from his own experiences, with most tracks written while he was undergoing therapy with Dr Arthur Janov in California. Featuring contributions by Yoko Ono, Ringo Starr, Klaus Voorman and Jan Wenner

programme.title: John & Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon's album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

programme.title: Bootsy Collins at Jazz à Vienne

programme.title: Down the Tracks: The Music That Influenced Led Zeppelin
programme.desc: Exploring the music that helped shape the rock band, including the blues and English folk music, as well as influence of the novels of JRR Tolkien

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The making of Black Sabbath's second album Paranoid, which was released in 1970 and helped define the sound and style of heavy metal. The programme tells the story of how Ozzy Osbourne, Tony Iommi, Geezer Butler and Bill Ward created the record, and features contributions by Phil Alexander, Geoff Barton, Henry Rollins and Jim Simpson

programme.desc: Gee and Howard investigate the murder of a radio talk-show host. Drama, starring Richard Belzer and Daniel Baldwin

programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Fish Town

programme.title: Fish Town

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A mass murderer is identified and the whole squad is put on 24-hour surveillance. Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer star

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The murderer of a well-known attorney presents himself to Pembleton and Bayliss. Police drama, starring Kyle Secor and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Kellerman investigate a murder in a motel where all the guests are possible suspects. Police drama, starring Reed Diamond, Clark Johnson, Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Kellerman and Lewis hit a wall of silence when investigating a murder at a housing project after a previous case caused the black community to distrust the police

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Demolition Man (1993)
programme.desc: Maverick cop John Spartan is frozen alive in 1996 and held in cryonic suspension for a crime he did not commit. Decades into the future, the dictator of a seemingly utopian city unleashes a criminal psychopath against his political enemy - but he proves impossible to control, forcing the authorities to revive Spartan to defeat him. Sci-fi thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bullock and Nigel Hawthorne

programme.title: First Knight (1995)
programme.desc: A wandering swordsman is knighted for his fighting prowess at the court of King Arthur and his wife, Lady Guinevere. However, the new knight and the queen develop a dangerous and secret attraction for each other, while a neighbouring warlord threatens the downfall of the kingdom. Adventure, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery, Julia Ormond and Ben Cross

programme.title: Speak Like a Child (1998)
programme.desc: A couple are reunited with a man they grew up with in a children's home years earlier - but the apparently happy reunion soon dredges up dark secrets from their past, and it's not long before tensions bubble to the surface. Drama, starring Cal Macaninch, Daniel Newman, Richard Mylan and Rachel Fielding

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood (1991)
programme.desc: A bright but underachieving teenager with a domineering single father strikes up a friendship with two brothers, and over time, the three young men each follow their own path - but a tragedy eventually leaves them facing a dangerous choice. Drama, starring Cuba Gooding Jr, Laurence Fishburne, Morris Chestnut and Ice Cube

programme.title: Bad Boys (1995)
programme.desc: Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett search for a $100million heroin consignment brazenly stolen by a French drug kingpin from the police evidence room. However, after a mix-up over a phone call from a potential witness, each cop has to assume the other's identity - Lowrey becoming the henpecked family man and Burnett the playboy. Michael Bay's action thriller, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Tea Leoni, Tcheky Karyo and Theresa Randle

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Batman Returns (1992)
programme.desc: The masked hero returns to face the Penguin, a grotesque crime boss dwelling in the sewers who conspires with a corrupt businessman to make himself mayor. When the tycoon tries to kill his secretary, she returns as vengeful vigilante Catwoman, who soon forms an intense relationship with the dark knight in both their costumed and real identities. Tim Burton's comic-book adventure sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris O'Donnell

programme.title: Batman & Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris O'Donnell

programme.title: Jerry Maguire (1996)
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wife's warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire (1994)
programme.desc: A man who claims to be 200 years old tells a reporter his story of how he was bitten during an encounter with a decadent and charismatic vampire in 18th-century New Orleans. He relates how his respect for the sanctity of human life clashed with his blood-lust, and how the pair came to be adoptive parents to a young girl. Gothic horror based on the novel by Anne Rice, with Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Kirsten Dunst, Antonio Banderas and Christian Slater

programme.title: True Romance (1993)
programme.desc: A shy clerk marries a hooker and kills her pimp, and together they go on the run to Los Angeles with $5million of cocaine they plan to sell. However, the drugs belong to the Mob and hitmen are soon on their trail. Tony Scott's thriller, written by Quentin Tarantino and starring Christian Slater, Patricia Arquette, Dennis Hopper, Gary Oldman, Val Kilmer, Brad Pitt and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Speak Like a Child (1998)
programme.desc: A couple are reunited with a man they grew up with in a children's home years earlier - but the apparently happy reunion soon dredges up dark secrets from their past, and it's not long before tensions bubble to the surface. Drama, starring Cal Macaninch, Daniel Newman, Richard Mylan and Rachel Fielding

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: An American architect agrees to marry a Mexican photographer after she falls pregnant after their ill-advised one-night stand. However, they quickly discover the pitfalls of their decision as cultures clash and sparks begin to fly. Romantic comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Salma Hayek, Jon Tenney and Carlos Gomez

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: The Wedding Singer (1998)
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Jerry Maguire (1996)
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance

Gothic horror based on the novel by Anne Rice, with Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Kirsten Dunst, Antonio Banderas and Christian Slater

programme.title: Se7en (1995)
programme.desc: An old-school detective and his headstrong new partner discover a connection between two unusually horrific murders, and realise they are on the trail of a serial killer who deems his victims to be each guilty of one of the seven deadly sins. However, the longer the cops pursue the murderer, the ever more twisted and disturbing the slayings become. David Fincher's thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Morgan Freeman, Gwyneth Paltrow and Kevin Spacey

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Anaconda (1997)
programme.desc: Film-makers venture deep into the Amazon jungle to document the lives of a remote tribe. However, the expedition is hijacked by a crazed hunter who plans to use them as bait to catch a gigantic killer snake. Adventure, starring Jennifer Lopez, Jon Voight, Ice Cube, Eric Stoltz and Jonathan Hyde

programme.title: Goodfellas (1990)
programme.desc: An Irish-Italian boy from a poor neighbourhood grows up idolising the glamorous lifestyle of the Mafia. Taken under the wing of a mobster, he rises quickly in the world of organised crime. But he soon has to face the realities of murder and treachery, while his involvement in drug deals puts him at risk from both sides of the law. Martin Scorsese's crime drama, starring Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro and an Oscar-winning Joe Pesci

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn (1996)
programme.desc: A crook and his unhinged brother take a preacher's family hostage and cross the border into Mexico. They head to a rough strip club to make a planned rendezvous with a third party - but they soon have to live on their wits when they realise that the establishment's staff are vampires. Horror, starring George Clooney, Harvey Keitel, Quentin Tarantino, Juliette Lewis and Salma Hayek

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lighton's Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (2025)
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. Romantic drama, starring Joely Richardson, Joanne Froggatt and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.desc: The blacksmiths are tasked with recreating the beastly Austro-Hungarian Hussar Saber for a chance to win $10,000 and the title of Forged in Fire Champion

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: JFK: The Final Evidence
programme.desc: Part one of two. The mystery behind the assassination of US President John F Kennedy in November 1963. His family, his foes, and who may have had motive to conspire to kill. Dr David J Hall unravels the evidence, alongside accounts from those who stood by and experts looking back with new knowledge. A recent document release from the US government also helps debunk the conspiracy, and sort facts from fantasy

programme.title: JFK: The Final Evidence
programme.desc: Part two of two. The mystery behind the assassination of US President John F Kennedy in November 1963. His family, his foes, and who may have had motive to conspire to kill. Dr David J Hall unravels the evidence, alongside accounts from those who stood by and experts looking back with new knowledge. A recent document release from the US government also helps debunk the conspiracy and sort facts from fantasy

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Archaeologists and anthropologists make discoveries that receive little notice because they fail to fit into the accepted scientific paradigm, such as an ancient hammer found in Texas or elongated skulls found on nearly every continent

programme.title: Knut: The Viking Emperor
programme.sub-title: The Revenge of a Landless King
programme.desc: The life and exploits of Knut the Great, who claimed the crowns of England, Norway and Denmark and forged an unprecedented union between Nordic and Anglo-Saxon lands

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Ashley and Seth continue continue their tense stand-off, but a demanding customer forces them to band together. A signed and authenticated Elvis record stimulates interest, but Les and Rich are wary of paying too much for it

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Archaeologists and anthropologists make discoveries that receive little notice because they fail to fit into the accepted scientific paradigm, such as an ancient hammer found in Texas or elongated skulls found on nearly every continent

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers suggest that the ancient site of Teotihuacan in central Mexico was once home to a highly advanced, perhaps extraterrestrial, civilization. Excavations at Teotihuacan have unearthed discoveries out of place in the ancient world

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro begins the longest Iditarod in the history of the famous sled dog race, Mike hunts elusive and rare silver foxes along the shoreline of Kodiak Island, Chance works to support his family through sub-zero temperatures on the trapline, while Soraya prepares for the imminent arrival of their new baby

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty rebuilds a snowmobile from scratch, before facing off with a wolverine menace on his trapline. Lauro feels the fatigue on the Iditarod trail and makes a wrong turn in the dark. Bret and Ivy ascend high into the Alaska Range to hunt dall sheep

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Documentary following brothers Marty and Rick Lagina as they search for the mysterious treasure buried on a Nova Scotia island, which is believed to be protected by a deadly curse

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The life of Ramses II - also known as Ramses the Great - who was a pharaoh of Egypt during the New Kingdom, a period of great prosperity for the country. He was a powerful ruler who expanded Egypt's borders, built monuments, and signed the first international peace treaty during his reign from 1279 to 1212BC

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The childhood years of Egyptian pharaoh Ramses the Great. It was largely spent in Luxor, where he was educated and prepared to become the heir to the throne

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: The secrets and lies of mighty pharaoh Ramses II, who ruled Egypt from 1279 to 1213BC - one of the longest reigns in pharaonic history. He was a cultural innovator, diplomat and self-promoter. He built monuments all over Egypt and as this documentary reveals became a caricature of his own propaganda for thousands of years

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: After five years' reign, Ramses II - also known as Ramses the Great - had already earned the distinction of being the most feared and respected among the martial pharaohs. He personally led his army with the aim of re-conquering the kingdoms of the Levant

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Ramses ruled Egypt for at least 29 years, although some Egyptologists think he could have ruled for as long as 30. Either way, it was one of the longest reigns in pharaonic history

programme.title: Ramses the Great: King of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Merenptah, the 13th son of Ramses II, the great pharaoh of Ancient Egypt. Merenptah became pharaoh after his father's long reign, when all of his older brothers had died. His reign was marked by feuds between rival branches of the family, and the throne was close to bankruptcy

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Palm Springs, California, in search of higher-end goods. Kenny tries to amp up the profit on an otherwise unimpressive unit. Rene sees quick potential where others don't. Brandi and Bozek try to keep their gains from squirming away

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The sun beats down in Oceanside, California, bringing out all the parasols. Dusty and Lupe steal a no-brainer locker, which pays off handsomely. Darrell taxes himself, which almost puts him in storage jail. Brandi and Lisa find their true identities

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Gam Gam
programme.desc: While in Santa Ana, Lisa 'channels her grandmother', in trying to turn a profit. Brandi contends with a tremendously frustrating day, Darrell tries to make a meal out of a snack-sized locker, while Kenny learns to prep himself for true stealthiness

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa comes to Montebello with a clear mind, intent on letting the lockers 'speak' to her. Ivy lets his son navigate his way to a unit which turns out not to be completely vacant. Kenny is absolutely appalled by what he finds abandoned in his unit

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Happisburgh in Norfolk, where the discovery of rare artefacts provides evidence of the earliest human occupation in Britain, challenging the conventional belief that mankind would not have been able to survive in northern Europe one million years ago. She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War

Patrick Stewart stars

programme.desc: Two burglars break into a house but get more than they bargain for. A man steals a computer tablet but gets rumbled by a pawnbroker, and a robber suffers a wardrobe malfunction

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A series of robberies in Bradford spreads fear through the city. A shopkeeper fights back when an armed gunman enters his store

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while there's no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs' ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: Spitfire (2018)
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story

programme.title: Last Seen Alive (2022)
programme.desc: Will Spann is driving his soon-to-be ex-wife Lisa to her parents' home when she mysteriously disappears without a trace during a stop at a gas station. A frantic Will engages the local police and Lisa's parents in a desperate attempt to find her, but as time passes and suspicion falls on him, he must take matters into his own hands, delving into the town's criminal underbelly while running from the authorities in a race against time. Thriller, with Gerard Butler and Jaimie Alexander

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man (1992)
programme.desc: A scientist's ill-advised experiments with virtual reality equipment transform a mentally handicapped gardener into a computer-enhanced megalomaniac with the power to make his dreams of world domination come true. Sci-fi thriller, starring Pierce Brosnan, Jeff Fahey, Jenny Wright, Geoffrey Lewis and Austin O'Brien

programme.desc: Profile of the eucalyptus-eating, tree-hugging Australian icons. The creatures live in the east and south-east parts of the continent. This episode reveals how their behaviours differ in different regions

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: While koalas may seem lazy, their behaviour drastically changes during mating season. As the season of love begins, the documentary follows two males on a mission to mate

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Following his visit to the Great Barrier Reef in 1957, naturalist and broadcaster David Attenborough returns and uses the latest filming techniques to unlock the secrets of the natural wonder. In the first edition, he descends beneath the waves at night and uses cutting-edge technology to generate computer scans of the sea floor. He also learns about a complex community of animals, as well as the annual coral spawning, which is responsible for the great diversity in the reef

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest technology, the naturalist explores the shark-infested waters of Osprey Reef in the Triton submersible, before returning to the nesting grounds of the Green Sea Turtle, 60 years after his first visit to Raine Island. He also marvels at manta ray cleaning stations on Lady Elliot Island, and tracks dwarf minke whales to discover their surprising reasons for returning, and why the reef is vital for their survival

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The naturalist examines what the next few decades may hold for this remarkable ecosystem, and looks at the work of scientists who are trying to preserve the area and the species that inhabit it, assisted by research vessel the Alucia. He also embarks on an ambitious attempt to dive further into the reef than ever before to witness the resilient coral that live down in the depths and see if they hold answers that may help to overcome challenges that lie ahead, as the impact of humans on the reef continues to take its toll

programme.desc: The crew investigates Terra Nova, a mysterious human colony that has evolved far beyond Archer's expectations. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: T'Pol joins the crew on a visit to an ancient Vulcan monastery, despite objecting that her human shipmate's presence could be a disruptive one. On landing, they are shocked to discover the spiritual sanctuary has been taken over by the Andorians, a paranoid race of aliens with a long history of conflict with the Vulcan people. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: While the crew researches a newly discovered comet, Archer tries to deal diplomatically with a the suspicious crew of a Vulcan vessel that is watching the ship. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The team members discover an inhabited Earth-like planet named Akaali and disguise themselves to look like its citizens in order to undertake an exploratory expedition. The crew learns the inhabitants are suffering from mysterious plague-like lesions and tries to help them find the cause. Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part one of two. Annorax, the Krenim's desperate leader, vows to manipulate time to alter the course of history and wipe out the enemy that annihilated his own colony - and quite possibly take out Captain Janeway's starship in the process. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Beltran

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part two of two. Chaos reigns as Annorax continues his mission to change history and eliminate entire civilisations, putting a proposal to Chakotay and Paris, who have been beamed aboard his ship. Paris balks at the thought of helping Annorax, but Chakotay insists they should trust him in a bid to continue their journey home, and even refuses to exploit a weakness they discover in the weapon-ship

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway and the crew encounter a telepathic race whose psychic abilities result in violence. Kate Mulgrew, Robert Beltran and Roxann Dawson star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway enlists Leonardo da Vinci's help to track down the pirates who robbed the ship of valuable equipment. John Rhys-Davies guest stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix, Chakotay and Paris are sent on a dangerous away mission deep inside a class-one nebula. Sci-fi drama, with Ethan Phillips, Robert Beltran and Robert Duncan McNeill

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor prepares his forces for war as the second meeting with Rick's prison group draws near, and with all hope of a peaceful resolution seemingly gone, Andrea decides she must warn her old friends they are about to walk into a trap. However, when she escapes from Woodbury, the town's brutal leader finds a new point of focus for his fury. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring David Morrissey and Laurie Holden

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are faced with a serious problem - if they want a truce with the Governor, they will have to make a huge sacrifice. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group must consider whether the prison is worth defending as the Governor's impending attack looms large. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu search for two missing teenagers, and realise they have been taken by an evil spirit of Christmas that plans to eat them as punishment for being naughty. Elsewhere, Renards' tour of Europe brings him closer to tracking down Adalind

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A priest is murdered by a boy he is performing an exorcism on. Nick and Hank investigate the case, which leads them to the Wesen Council. Meanwhile, Renard leaves town to deal with the situation in Europe

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: When law-abiding space cop Ash Harper is convicted of a crime she did not commit, she is sentenced to exile and loaded onto prison spaceship the Hemlock. Her mother Rebecca, who is head of galactic security, is determined to prove her daughter's innocence and bring her safely home, but any hopes of a reunion are dashed when Ash's fellow convicts overthrow the guards and hijack the Hemlock. Sci-fi drama, starring Savannah Steyn and Natasha O'Keeffe

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: As the Hemlock fugitives set about salvaging their crash-landed ship, Ash makes her escape through an alien desert and makes an unwelcome acquaintance in the form of scruffy space-pirate Echo Nantu-Rose. Meanwhile, Rebecca's fears over her daughter's plight are compounded when she learns that terrorist organisation ARC was behind Ash's wrongful imprisonment

programme.title: Intergalactic
programme.desc: Drifting through space without the co-ordinates to Arcadia, the crew encounters another setback - the Hemlock is running out of power. Ash, Verona and Echo embark upon a race-against-time heist at Commonworld fuel reserve NAR-59, but with Dr Emma Grieves still aboard and her mission incomplete, Ash must aid and abet her fellow fugitives just enough to avoid suspicion - a strategy with devastating consequences

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen (2007)
programme.desc: Danny Ocean rounds up his band of crooks for one last heist. Gang member Reuben has been left traumatised and in a coma after being double-crossed by crooked casino owner Willy Bank, and Danny decides that payback is in order. He plans a scheme that will leave Bank penniless, but needs the help of an old enemy. Comedy crime caper sequel, with George Clooney, Al Pacino, Brad Pitt, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia, Don Cheadle and Elliott Gould

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven (2001)
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegas's biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderbergh's crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the world's most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdan's fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Julian joins Matty on the surveillance of a Wellbrexa executive's ex-wife, while Hunter from the firm's floater pool assists on a manslaughter case involving a health-care worker

programme.title: FBI

As the financial details of the case begin to unfold, Scola's previous Wall Street career - and the reasons he left - come to light

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called in to investigate the death of a billionaire radio mogul's eldest son, whose body has been found covered in latex paint. Evidence initially implicates the victim's much younger stepmother - but as the case unfolds, a complicated series of intertwined relationships is revealed. With guest star Malcolm McDowell

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A man returning from Vietnam has something in his bag that he doesn't want his mother to see, while an emotional American woman says she is visiting Australia to tie up some loose ends from a failed relationship - but a mystery man arrives and turns her story upside down. Two Chinese visitors squabble among themselves when officers discover prohibited items in their bags, and things get messy when searching a large container

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the shooting of a murder suspect, and there is no shortage of potential culprits, with his angry wife and vengeful brother high on the list. There's just one little puzzle to solve before the cops can even think about whodunit - at the time of the killing, the victim was in police custody, behind three locked doors guarded by Dwayne and JP. So how did the shooter manage to slip through undetected? As if that wasn't enough for Humphrey to worry about, he also has an unexpected visit from his father (guest star James Fox), with whom he doesn't exactly see eye to eye

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The celebratory launch of a new luxury resort is cut short when a woman is found electrocuted in her hotel bathtub - with the door locked from the inside. It looks like a simple case of suicide, but with Jack Mooney no longer around to confirm Commissioner Selwyn's suspicions, DI Neville Parker is temporarily flown over from Manchester to close the case. However, he soon realises that island life is not for him, so when evidence of suspicious activity turns up, he is dismayed to realise he will have to extend his stay and investigate the case as murder. Ralf Little joins the cast, with guest appearances by Steve Pemberton and Samantha Bond

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: Allegiance

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A desert island survival course goes wrong when the leader - a trained survival expert and ex-SAS soldier - is found dead in the forest of a remote island near Saint Marie. Having ventured off into the wilderness alone and with no other people on the island apart from the trip participants, suspicion soon falls upon them. But with all of the course members providing one another with an alibi, how could any of them have committed the murder? That's what new detective inspector Neville intends to find out. Starring Ralf Little

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Footballer-turned-property expert Dion Dublin, comedians Bob Mortimer and Lucy Porter, and entertainer Debbie McGee join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Alan Davies, quiz show guru Richard Osman, writer Germaine Greer and footballer Jermaine Jenas bolster the efforts of team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the panel show in which participants attempt to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Host Sandi Toksvig is joined by Alan Davies, Jason Manford, Ahir Shah and Holly Walsh in an extended version of the quiz

programme.title: Frankie Boyle's New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedians Katherine Ryan and Tom Rosenthal to try out dating gadgets - including a £1,500 handbag that displays messages and a carbon dioxide cooling vest to make sure the wearer remains ice cold however hot things get. For those already in a relationship, Richard and actor Sanjeev Bhaskar investigate 3D chocolate printing, virtual flowers and a new system that teaches people how to play romantic music on the piano

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers make a massive seizure of meth hidden inside fruit crates, a former teacher is taken surprise by a warrant for her arrest, and a Syrian man begs for help

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: 120 kilograms of cocaine are discovered in the axles of a lowboy trailer, and two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cock-fighting

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage perform a dirty rescue from a mud pit, but they must do the job by hand with Christopher injured

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef visits Mumbai in search of the bombil, the fish used in Bombay duck, and also enjoys Parsee hospitality and learns about their contribution to Indian cuisine. He then travels south to Pondicherry, where locals prepare Indian dishes with a French twist, before heading north along the coast to Mamallapuram to sample one of the best fish curries he has ever had. Rick also demonstrates how to make popular Parsee chicken dish sali murgh and personal favourite aloo mattar

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Sports commentator Clare Balding, Radio 1 DJ Nick Grimshaw and comedians Rhod Gilbert and Rob Delaney join forces with team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the panel show in which participants attempt to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining regular team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are snooker veteran Steve Davis, actor Craig Parkinson, comedian Sara Pascoe and Strictly co-host Claudia Winkleman. They all have amazing stories to share, but whether or not they are true or works of fiction remains to be seen

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall, Jodie Kidd, Jamali Maddix and Suzi Perry test their general knowledge skills, and the winner of the week's games is announced

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouver's opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson is in the driving seat testing two supercars - the Lamborghini Murcielago and Pagani Zonda. He is joined by co-presenters Jason Dawe and Richard Hammond as well as special guest Harry Enfield, who drives a fast lap of the Top Gear test track in a reasonably priced car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the Ford Focus RS, Richard Hammond goes off-road in the Subaru Forester, and Jason Dawe provides a guide to buying a used BMW M3. Jamiroquai singer and car enthusiast Jay Kay joins the team in the Top Gear base and an unusual challenge involving motorbikes and a bus is attempted

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British markets and the produce sold at them, making a rich walnut and fudge cake and preparing two seasonal soups. They also travel to Ludlow, Shropshire, to check out the stalls at a food festival and discuss the impact supermarkets have had on what people eat

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedians Katherine Ryan and Tom Rosenthal to try out dating gadgets - including a £1,500 handbag that displays messages and a carbon dioxide cooling vest to make sure the wearer remains ice cold however hot things get. For those already in a relationship, Richard and actor Sanjeev Bhaskar investigate 3D chocolate printing, virtual flowers and a new system that teaches people how to play romantic music on the piano

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers make a massive seizure of meth hidden inside fruit crates, a former teacher is taken surprise by a warrant for her arrest, and a Syrian man begs for help

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: 120 kilograms of cocaine are discovered in the axles of a lowboy trailer, and two men are caught attempting to smuggle a rooster for cock-fighting

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage perform a dirty rescue from a mud pit, but they must do the job by hand with Christopher injured

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef visits Mumbai in search of the bombil, the fish used in Bombay duck, and also enjoys Parsee hospitality and learns about their contribution to Indian cuisine. He then travels south to Pondicherry, where locals prepare Indian dishes with a French twist, before heading north along the coast to Mamallapuram to sample one of the best fish curries he has ever had. Rick also demonstrates how to make popular Parsee chicken dish sali murgh and personal favourite aloo mattar

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Sports commentator Clare Balding, Radio 1 DJ Nick Grimshaw and comedians Rhod Gilbert and Rob Delaney join forces with team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the panel show in which participants attempt to deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

They all have amazing stories to share, but whether or not they are true or works of fiction remains to be seen

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall, Jodie Kidd, Jamali Maddix and Suzi Perry test their general knowledge skills, and the winner of the week's games is announced

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels the length of North and South America. The expedition begins at the northernmost point in Alaska, journeying south through Canada to the border with the US. In Denali National Park, he witnesses first hand the impact of climate change on a glacier. He also hunts caribou with native Americans, hears from both sides of the conflict over a controversial oil drilling plan, and discovers Vancouver's opioid addiction crisis

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson is in the driving seat testing two supercars - the Lamborghini Murcielago and Pagani Zonda. He is joined by co-presenters Jason Dawe and Richard Hammond as well as special guest Harry Enfield, who drives a fast lap of the Top Gear test track in a reasonably priced car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson tests the Ford Focus RS, Richard Hammond goes off-road in the Subaru Forester, and Jason Dawe provides a guide to buying a used BMW M3. Jamiroquai singer and car enthusiast Jay Kay joins the team in the Top Gear base and an unusual challenge involving motorbikes and a bus is attempted

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British markets and the produce sold at them, making a rich walnut and fudge cake and preparing two seasonal soups. They also travel to Ludlow, Shropshire, to check out the stalls at a food festival and discuss the impact supermarkets have had on what people eat
